model.sql:
WITH g6a_string_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    customer_name,
    email_address,
    city_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  trim(customer_name) AS customer_name_trimmed,
  upper(customer_name) AS customer_name_upper,
  concat_ws(' | ', customer_name, city_name) AS display_label,
  substring(email_address, 1, 5) AS email_prefix
FROM g6a_string_source

WITH g6b_regex_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    product_code,
    free_text
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  regexp_extract(product_code, '^([A-Z]+)', 1) AS product_prefix,
  regexp_extract(product_code, '([0-9]+)$', 1) AS product_suffix_digits,
  regexp_replace(free_text, '[0-9]', '#') AS text_with_digits_masked
FROM g6b_regex_source

WITH g6c_numeric_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    gross_amount,
    discount_amount,
    quantity
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  round(gross_amount - coalesce(discount_amount, 0.0), 2) AS net_amount_rounded,
  ceil(gross_amount) AS gross_amount_ceiling,
  floor(gross_amount) AS gross_amount_floor,
  pmod(quantity, 10) AS quantity_mod_10
FROM g6c_numeric_source

WITH g6d_math_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    x_value,
    y_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  sqrt(abs(x_value)) AS x_sqrt,
  pow(x_value, 2) AS x_squared,
  log10(greatest(y_value, 1)) AS y_log10,
  sin(x_value) AS x_sine
FROM g6d_math_source

WITH g6e_bitwise_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    permission_mask,
    feature_mask
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  permission_mask & feature_mask AS enabled_feature_mask,
  permission_mask | feature_mask AS combined_mask,
  permission_mask ^ feature_mask AS differing_bits_mask,
  shiftright(permission_mask, 1) AS permission_mask_shifted
FROM g6e_bitwise_source

WITH g6f_bitmap_source AS (
  SELECT
    segment_id,
    activity_date,
    CAST(user_id AS BIGINT) AS user_id
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
  WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
),
g6f_bitmap_positions AS (
  SELECT
    segment_id,
    activity_date,
    bitmap_bucket_number(user_id) AS bitmap_bucket_id,
    bitmap_bit_position(user_id) AS bitmap_bit_offset
  FROM g6f_bitmap_source
),
g6f_daily_bitmaps AS (
  SELECT
    segment_id,
    activity_date,
    bitmap_bucket_id,
    bitmap_construct_agg(bitmap_bit_offset) AS bucket_bitmap
  FROM g6f_bitmap_positions
  GROUP BY segment_id, activity_date, bitmap_bucket_id
),
g6f_merged_bitmaps AS (
  SELECT
    segment_id,
    bitmap_bucket_id,
    bitmap_or_agg(bucket_bitmap) AS merged_bucket_bitmap
  FROM g6f_daily_bitmaps
  GROUP BY segment_id, bitmap_bucket_id
)
SELECT
  segment_id,
  SUM(bitmap_count(merged_bucket_bitmap)) AS distinct_user_count
FROM g6f_merged_bitmaps
GROUP BY segment_id

WITH g6g_date_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    order_date,
    renewal_date
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  order_date,
  date_add(order_date, 7) AS order_date_plus_7_days,
  add_months(order_date, 1) AS order_date_plus_1_month,
  last_day(order_date) AS order_month_end_date,
  datediff(renewal_date, order_date) AS days_until_renewal
FROM g6g_date_source

WITH g6h_timestamp_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    event_ts,
    processed_ts_utc
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  event_ts,
  date_trunc('HOUR', event_ts) AS event_hour_start,
  dateadd(MINUTE, 15, event_ts) AS event_ts_plus_15_minutes,
  current_timestamp() AS model_run_ts,
  from_utc_timestamp(processed_ts_utc, 'Europe/London') AS processed_ts_london
FROM g6h_timestamp_source

WITH g6i_interval_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    contract_start_ts,
    grace_period_days,
    review_interval_months
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  contract_start_ts + INTERVAL '7' DAY AS contract_start_plus_7_days,
  contract_start_ts + make_dt_interval(grace_period_days) AS grace_due_ts,
  make_ym_interval(0, review_interval_months) AS review_interval_ym,
  contract_start_ts + make_ym_interval(0, review_interval_months) AS review_due_ts
FROM g6i_interval_source

WITH g6j_case_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    order_status,
    overdue_days,
    order_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  CASE
    WHEN order_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 'CLOSED'
    WHEN overdue_days > 30 THEN 'COLLECTIONS'
    WHEN order_amount >= 1000 THEN 'HIGH_VALUE_OPEN'
    ELSE 'OPEN'
  END AS order_segment
FROM g6j_case_source

WITH g6k_if_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    is_priority,
    order_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  if(is_priority, 'PRIORITY', 'STANDARD') AS service_tier,
  if(order_amount >= 500, order_amount * 0.95, order_amount) AS discounted_amount
FROM g6k_if_source

WITH g6l_iff_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    score_value,
    pass_mark,
    variance_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  iff(score_value >= pass_mark, 'PASS', 'FAIL') AS assessment_status,
  iff(abs(variance_amount) > 100, true, false) AS requires_review
FROM g6l_iff_source

WITH g6m_coalesce_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    preferred_email,
    work_email,
    personal_email,
    discount_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  coalesce(preferred_email, work_email, personal_email) AS contact_email,
  coalesce(discount_amount, 0.0) AS normalized_discount
FROM g6m_coalesce_source

WITH g6n_nullif_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    promo_code,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  nullif(trim(promo_code), '') AS normalized_promo_code,
  nullif(metric_value, 0) AS non_zero_metric_value
FROM g6n_nullif_source

WITH g6o_nvl_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    account_manager,
    target_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  nvl(account_manager, 'UNASSIGNED') AS assigned_manager,
  nvl(target_amount, 0.0) AS target_amount_filled
FROM g6o_nvl_source

WITH g6p_ifnull_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    closed_ts,
    created_ts,
    country_code
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  ifnull(closed_ts, created_ts) AS effective_event_ts,
  ifnull(country_code, 'UNKNOWN') AS normalized_country_code
FROM g6p_ifnull_source

WITH g6q_greatest_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    invoice_amount,
    credit_limit,
    forecast_amount,
    created_ts,
    updated_ts,
    published_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  greatest(invoice_amount, credit_limit, forecast_amount) AS highest_financial_value,
  greatest(created_ts, updated_ts, published_ts) AS latest_known_ts
FROM g6q_greatest_source

WITH g6r_least_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    start_date,
    target_date,
    actual_date,
    sla_minutes,
    target_minutes,
    actual_minutes
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  least(start_date, target_date, actual_date) AS earliest_relevant_date,
  least(sla_minutes, target_minutes, actual_minutes) AS lowest_minute_value
FROM g6r_least_source

WITH g6s_decode_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    status_code,
    priority_code
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  decode(status_code, 'N', 'NEW', 'P', 'PROCESSING', 'C', 'COMPLETE', 'UNKNOWN') AS status_label,
  decode(priority_code, 1, 'LOW', 2, 'MEDIUM', 3, 'HIGH', 'UNMAPPED') AS priority_label
FROM g6s_decode_source

WITH g6t_cast_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    raw_amount,
    raw_event_date,
    raw_is_active
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  cast(raw_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS amount_decimal,
  cast(raw_event_date AS DATE) AS event_date,
  cast(raw_is_active AS BOOLEAN) AS is_active
FROM g6t_cast_source

WITH g6u_try_cast_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    raw_amount,
    raw_event_ts,
    raw_user_id
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  try_cast(raw_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS amount_decimal,
  try_cast(raw_event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
  try_cast(raw_user_id AS BIGINT) AS user_id
FROM g6u_try_cast_source

WITH g6v_hash_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    email_address
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  md5(cast(email_address AS BINARY)) AS email_md5,
  sha2(concat_ws('||', cast(record_id AS STRING), business_key), 256) AS record_fingerprint_sha256,
  xxhash64(record_id, business_key) AS record_fingerprint_xxhash64,
  hash(cast(record_id AS BIGINT), business_key) AS record_hash
FROM g6v_hash_source

WITH g6w_encoding_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    payload_text,
    query_string
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  base64(payload_text) AS payload_base64,
  cast(unbase64(base64(payload_text)) AS STRING) AS payload_roundtrip_text,
  url_encode(query_string) AS query_string_url_encoded,
  hex(cast(payload_text AS BINARY)) AS payload_hex
FROM g6w_encoding_source

WITH g6x_encryption_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    customer_secret,
    secret_key_16
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g6x_encrypted AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    customer_secret,
    secret_key_16,
    aes_encrypt(customer_secret, secret_key_16) AS encrypted_secret
  FROM g6x_encryption_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  base64(encrypted_secret) AS encrypted_secret_base64,
  cast(aes_decrypt(encrypted_secret, secret_key_16) AS STRING) = customer_secret AS decrypted_roundtrip_matches_source
FROM g6x_encrypted

WITH g6y_geospatial_source AS (
  SELECT
    location_id,
    point_wkt,
    service_area_wkt
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g6y_geometries AS (
  SELECT
    location_id,
    st_geomfromwkt(point_wkt) AS location_geom,
    st_geomfromwkt(service_area_wkt) AS service_area_geom
  FROM g6y_geospatial_source
)
SELECT
  location_id,
  st_geometrytype(location_geom) AS location_geom_type,
  st_astext(st_centroid(service_area_geom)) AS service_area_centroid_wkt,
  st_contains(service_area_geom, location_geom) AS location_within_service_area
FROM g6y_geometries

WITH g6z_lambda_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    score_array,
    attribute_map
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  transform(score_array, score -> score + 5) AS boosted_scores,
  filter(score_array, score -> score >= 70) AS passing_scores,
  exists(score_array, score -> score < 50) AS has_failing_score,
  map_filter(attribute_map, (k, v) -> v IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_attributes
FROM g6z_lambda_source

WITH g6aa_like_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    email_address
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  email_address
FROM g6aa_like_source
WHERE email_address LIKE '%@example.com'

WITH g6ab_ilike_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    customer_name
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  customer_name
FROM g6ab_ilike_source
WHERE customer_name ILIKE 'acme%'

WITH g6ac_rlike_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    product_code
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  product_code
FROM g6ac_rlike_source
WHERE product_code RLIKE '^[A-Z]{3}-[0-9]{4}$'

WITH g6ad_between_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    order_date,
    amount_due
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  order_date,
  amount_due
FROM g6ad_between_source
WHERE order_date BETWEEN DATE '2026-01-01' AND DATE '2026-12-31'
  AND amount_due BETWEEN 100 AND 1000

WITH g6ae_is_distinct_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    expected_status,
    actual_status
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  expected_status,
  actual_status,
  expected_status IS DISTINCT FROM actual_status AS status_mismatch_flag
FROM g6ae_is_distinct_source
WHERE expected_status IS DISTINCT FROM actual_status
